Groovy //region shawxingkwok: android-util-view android.lintOptions.disable 'NonConstantResourceId' tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += "-Xcontext-receivers" } dependencies { implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-util-view:1.0.0' } //endregion Kotlin //region shawxingkwok: android-util-view android.lintOptions.disable("NonConstantResourceId") tasks.withType<org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile>().configureEach { kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += "-Xcontext-receivers" } dependencies { implementation("io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0") implementation("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-util-view:1.0.0") } //endregion Document #

title: KDataStore
content:
中文版本
An extended data store with little configuration, easy encryption and extensive supported types (basic types, kt-serializable, java-serializable and customed).
Basic feature preview # view Your browser doesn't support embedded videos, but don't worry, you can download it and watch it with your favorite video player! compose Your browser doesn't support embedded videos, but don't worry, you can download it and watch it with your favorite video player! Actual performance contrast # TODO
Setup # Get a sample or configure as below.
view groovy //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable 'NonConstantResourceId' tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += '-Xcontext-receivers' } dependencies { implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-util-view:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore:1.0.0' } //endregion kotlin //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable ("NonConstantResourceId") tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += "-Xcontext-receivers" } dependencies { implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0") implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-util-view:1.0.0") implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore:1.0.0") } //endregion compose groovy //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable 'NonConstantResourceId' tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += '-Xcontext-receivers' } dependencies { implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore-compose:1.0.0' } //endregion kotlin //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable ("NonConstantResourceId") tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += "-Xcontext-receivers" } dependencies { implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0") implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore-compose:1.0.0") } //endregion Core Usage # Configure # Update # // async Settings.isDarkMode.toss(true) Settings.isDarkMode.toss{ !it } // suspend Settings.isDarkMode.emit(true) Settings.isDarkMode.emit{ !it } That type Flow is declared inside class KDataStore and extends from the official Flow, being both collectable and mutable.
Collect # view I suggest my collectOnResume if in Fragment.
class MainFragment : Fragment(){ override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) { super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState) Settings.isDarkMode.collectOnResume{ switch.isChecked = it } } } compose I suggest my flow state extension.
use Kotlin serialization # Usage # It’s an official platform-neutral data conversion, and directly savable in my KDataStore.
import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable import pers.shawxingkwok.kdatastore.KDataStore @Serializable data class Data(val a: Int, val b: String) object MDataStore: KDataStore(){ val data by ktSerializable(Data(1, "")) } Config # Groovy plugins{ id 'kotlinx-serialization' version "$kt_version" } dependencies { implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.5.0' } Kotlin plugins{ id ("kotlinx-serialization") version ("$kt_version") } dependencies { implementation ("org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.5.0") } Migration # There is a protected context inside KDataStore for you to get other stores like SharedPreferences, DataStore.
Encryption # default encrypted
This encryption part references https://github.com/MFlisar/MaterialPreferences. Options # scope # TODO(handlerScope, ioScope)
file name # Details # Reset # updateAll #

title: Docs
content:
About me # This website displays all my personal open-source works which are all written in Kotlin-jvm at present.
My code is probably the globally best at present for its functionality, creativity, difficulty, structure, efficiency, and beauty. Wish you could learn from it！I also encourage those authorities to provide better tutorials with embedded short videos instead of all voluminous words.
In addition, if you are familiar with IT, feel hard to learn Kotlin and love Java or Go more, your logic ability mustn’t be well enough for you to engage in IT. If so, do something you love and must excel at. I have no offensive intention, just meaning everyone has his strengths and weaknesses, and every job has its threshold.
At last, I have two other halfway done wonderful works and am waiting for some company to help make IDE plugins. I have sent resumes to common top internet companies, but those limited resume sizes are too small and they didn’t give me opportunities to display.
Welcome to connect with me via ShawxingKwok@126.com.

title: Kdata Store中文版本
content:
KDataStore # 不同存储方案对比 # 30 份 String 数据
TODO(给出 KDataStore 的启动时间)
SharedPreferences MMKV DataStore KDataStore 机制 commit 同步写入磁盘，如果返回 true 则写入内存, 但堵塞主线程 1.5 ms 一般通过 apply 先写入内存，后异步写入磁盘 先读取到系统级别的内存，然后每隔一段时间写入磁盘 异步写入磁盘，后更新内存，通过 Flow 异步观察 基于 DataStore。先写入内存，即时异步写入磁盘，包括备份文件。 采取事务(transactional) No, 但采用了原子操作以改善 后续校验数据，尝试恢复，不行则删除 Yes Yes 读取中遇 IOException 返回默认值 返回默认值 自行处理 从备份文件中取 写入中遇 IOException commit(堵塞) 返回 falseapply 无反馈 后续校验数据，尝试恢复，不行则删除。 自行处理 记录，下次启动时从备份文件中更新 CorruptionException 不方便处理 后续校验数据，尝试恢复，不行则删除 自行处理 已通过复制备份文件数据处理 多进程共享 自行封装 支持 处于 alpha 阶段 DataStore 正式支持之后 加密 自行封装 支持 自行封装 支持 类型 常见基本类型 + String + Set<String> 常见基本类型 + String + Set<String> + Parcelable 常见基本类型 + String + Set<String> 常见基本类型 + String + enum + Serializable + KtSerializable + 自定义 额外信息 ANR前一刻更新的数据不会丢失 断电或者系统崩溃后容易丢失很多数据 第一次同步取数据时耗时 24 ms 后续可忽略 微配置 同时支持单项数据的 nullability (可空性) 和 default (默认值) 初启动时间 30 份数据的时间，300 份数据的时间, 可在 Application 中(或startup) 里通过 thread{ } 异步启动 比较新， 但基于 DataStore 且代码较少, 仅 TODO 行， 即时有 Bug 也比较少。 迁移 (Migration) # KDataStore 内置 protected context 供你获取其他存储仓库，如 SharedPreferences, DataStore.
这份中文版本主要为初期的宣传考虑，其他作品并不会写中文版本和 Java 扩展。 关于其他地方的存储方案分析，绝大多数对比都有失偏颇，大多数测试都有严重错误。 官网介绍相对准确，但经常掩盖缺点，建议配合 ChatGpt 查阅分析。
